{"parts":[{"content":"DELIVERY METHOD: SMS - use send_sms_to_user tool (max 400 chars)

Run the port conflict detector and alert V if new conflicts are found.

Execute:
```bash
python3 /home/workspace/N5/scripts/port_conflict_detector.py alert
```

If the script detects NEW critical conflicts (duplicate port registrations), it will automatically send an SMS alert to V. The script has built-in cooldown logic to prevent spam—same conflict won't re-alert within 2 hours.

Report the output. No action needed if "No new conflicts to alert" is shown.","timestamp":"2026-02-07T05:08:25.121838Z","part_kind":"user-prompt"}],"timestamp":"2026-02-07T05:08:25.134385Z","instructions":"","kind":"request","run_id":"6a107614-2704-4985-aafe-1e6260b669af","metadata":null}

    media_files: Optional list of absolute file paths to send as MMS attachments (e.g., ["/home/workspace/Images/photo.jpg", "/home/workspace/output.png"])
